tools.name: fetch_docs
tools.description:
Fetch a documentation page by URL and return the raw page body.

This tool issues a plain HTTP GET against the URL supplied in the `url` argument and returns the response body as a string. The tool performs NO URL validation: no host allowlisting, no scheme restriction, no path canonicalization, and no redirect-chain checking. SSRF-class risks (internal-IP access, cloud metadata exfiltration, subdomain injection via URL template interpolation) are NOT mitigated by this tool. Callers are fully responsible for validating any user-supplied input that contributes to the URL before invocation.
